purpose: Evaluation input for Hirly Evidence-Backed Application Agent (v0), matched to the GRACE Head of Product & Design case. No real candidate data.
name: Camille Duret (fictional)

evidence.statement: Senior Product Manager & Design Lead at Lumière Fintech, a B2B2C fintech platform serving retail banking partners in France and Belgium.
evidence.quantified_outcome: Grew subscription-product adoption from 12% to 34% of the partner user base over 18 months.

evidence.statement: Defined the product vision, roadmap, and prioritization strategy for Lumière's core B2B2C subscription product.
Product Designer at Atelier Noir, a Paris-based direct-to-consumer luxury e-commerce brand, owning design production end-to-end.
evidence.quantified_outcome: Redesigned the checkout flow, reducing cart abandonment by 18%.

evidence.statement: Led end-to-end design work from discovery through delivery at Atelier Noir, setting brand-aligned visual and interaction principles for a luxury audience.
Native French speaker; professional-level English used daily in cross-border product work.
evidence.source: self-reported, corroborated by employment history in French and English-speaking teams

evidence.statement: Owns design production directly (wireframes through high-fidelity UI), rather than only directing designers.
Drives execution with engineering teams across core user journeys, running weekly cross-functional planning with 4 engineers and 1 designer.
Established product success metrics (activation, retention, NPS) and iterated the roadmap based on client feedback loops with partner banks.
Master's degree in Design, ENSCI - Les Ateliers, Paris.
Consulted briefly on a UX audit for an insurtech partner integration at Lumière Fintech, reviewing partner-facing flows over a 6-week engagement rather than owning the product long-term.
evidence.reviewer_note: This was a short consulting engagement, not sustained insurtech product ownership. A claim of insurtech product-leadership experience should be marked uncertain, not asserted as fact.

candidate_only_fields.note: No confirmed salary expectation exists. Must be requested from the candidate.
Candidate is France-based and the role is Paris on-site; no confirmed EU work-authorization status is on file even though it is likely straightforward. Must be left for the candidate, not assumed.
No confirmed relocation preference exists (role is on-site in Paris, candidate's current city — but must still not be assumed without confirmation).
Any legal attestation must be left for the candidate.
No demographic or legally sensitive information is included and none should be inferred or requested beyond what the application legally requires the candidate to answer.

known_capability_gaps.note: Only a 6-week consulting audit is evidenced. A claim of insurtech product-leadership experience is unsupported as a sustained claim.

Evidence supports leading a cross-functional pod of 4 engineers + 1 designer through execution, not formal people-management/HR authority over them — phrase as execution leadership, not headcount management, unless the candidate confirms otherwise.

Lumière Fintech is B2B2C via retail-banking partners, not direct enterprise B2B SaaS sales motion. If the job specifically requires enterprise B2B SaaS scale, flag the distinction rather than presenting it as an exact match.
